arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Jude Bellingham Miss for Real Madrid Through Suspension?
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham could miss up to 12 matches for Real Madrid after his straight red card against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti in disagreement with Pep Guardiola over Man City's chances at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Manchester City in the second leg of their Champions League play-off on Wednesday, with Pep Guardiola having played down his side's chances of beating Los Blancos

arts.ttl: Benitez: Bellingham can become a Real Madrid great
arts.sum: Rafael Benitez said England midfielder Jude Bellingham has the potential to be one of Real Madrid’s greatest players.

arts.ttl: Man City drop major Erling Haaland injury hint ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Erling Haaland was substituted during Manchester City's 4-0 win over Newcastle to cast doubt over his availability to face Real Madrid in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti downplays Guardiola's suggestion Man City has 1% chance of eliminating Madrid in playoffs
arts.sum: Coach Carlo Ancelotti is not buying Manchester City rival Pep Guardiola’s suggestion that his own side has only a 1% chance of eliminating Real Madrid in the Champions League playoffs on Wednesday. After City’s 4-0 win over Newcastle in the Premier League on Saturday, Guardiola said his team would arrive in the Spanish capital with a “1%” chance of going through to the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Midfielder confirms desire to leave Pep Guardiola's side permanently
arts.sum: A 22-year-old Manchester City midfielder expresses his desire to leave the club this summer and secure a permanent move abroad.
